metadata.title: Training & e-Academy | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Master global standards with GS1 Saudi Arabia e-Academy. Specialized training for SFDA, ZATCA, and 2D barcode migration.

hero.title: Master the Language of
hero.description: Your gateway to excellence. Join thousands of Saudi professionals in mastering GS1 standards to drive innovation, traceability, and compliance with Saudi Vision 2030.

about.title: GS1 e-Academy Training Center
about.subtitle: Your Gateway to Global Standards Excellence
about.description: Join the GS1 e-Academy Training Center to elevate your expertise in global standards. Through our comprehensive courses, you'll gain the knowledge and skills needed to drive innovation and efficiency in your industry. Whether you're focusing on 2D barcodes, RFID, or healthcare standards, our training programs are designed to help you unlock the future of your supply chain.

features.heading: Why Learn with GS1 Saudi Arabia?

items.title: Expert Instructors
items.desc: Courses designed by GS1 global leads and Saudi supply chain experts for local market needs.

items.title: Official Certification
items.desc: Earn verified GS1 badges to boost your career and organizational compliance with SFDA & ZATCA.

items.title: Future-Ready Skills
items.desc: Master RFID, EPCIS, and 2D Digital Link—the technological pillars of Saudi Vision 2030.

items.title: 2D Barcodes & Sunrise 2027
items.desc: Prepare for the global migration from 1D to 2D QR codes with GS1 Digital Link.

items.title: Healthcare Traceability (SFDA)
items.desc: Specialized training for GS1 DataMatrix implementation in Human and Veterinary medicine.

items.title: ZATCA & GLN Essentials
items.desc: Learn how Global Location Numbers (GLN) power the Kingdom's e-invoicing ecosystem.
